hero.headline: Manage Your Google Business Profile Without Guesswork
hero.subHeadline: Pragati360 helps local businesses publish posts, respond to reviews, and maintain accurate information on Google Business Profile—without silent failures or automation surprises.

publishPosts.title: Publish Posts
publishPosts.description: Schedule and publish to Google Business Profile with human approval

manageReviews.title: Manage Reviews
manageReviews.description: Respond to reviews without missing notifications

updateInfo.title: Update Info
updateInfo.description: Keep hours, services, and photos current

builtForControl.headline: Built for Control
builtForControl.point2: Clear notifications when something needs attention

earlyAccessTransparency.headline: Why Early Access?
earlyAccessTransparency.body: We're focused on making Google Business Profile management reliable before expanding to other platforms. Instagram, Facebook, and unified scheduling are planned for later this year.

pricingPreview.headline: Pricing Preview
pricingPreview.message: Simple, predictable pricing for local businesses.

finalCta.headline: Ready to Take Control?
finalCta.subText: We'll reach out within 2 business days.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.headline: How Pragati360 Works
howItWorks.subHeadline: A clear workflow for managing your Google Business Profile.

overview.headline: Overview
overview.body: Pragati360 connects to your Google Business Profile and gives you a single place to schedule posts, respond to reviews, and update your business information.

step1.title: Connect Your Google Business Profile
step1.description: We guide you through Google's authentication (one-time setup)

step2.title: Schedule Posts
step2.description: Write posts, add photos, choose publish time

step3.title: Review Before Publishing
step3.description: All posts wait for your approval

step4.title: Stay Notified
step4.description: Get alerts for new reviews, post status, or errors

whatsIncluded.headline: What's Included
whatsIncluded.feature5: Activity log (see what was published and when)

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.headline: Simple Pricing for Local Businesses
pricing.subHeadline: No hidden fees. No per-post charges. Start at ₹199/month.

multiLocation.headline: Multi-Location Pricing
multiLocation.point3: Owner or Manager role required per location

q1.question: Is there a free trial?
q1.answer: Early Access includes a guided setup call. We'll help you decide if it's a fit.

q2.question: Can I add more locations later?

q3.question: What if Google Business Profile changes?
q3.answer: We monitor API changes and update immediately.

q4.question: When will Instagram be available?
q4.answer: Planned for Q2 2026, after Early Access phase.

earlyAccess.title: Request Early Access
earlyAccess.headline: Request Early Access
earlyAccess.subHeadline: We're onboarding local businesses manually to ensure quality and reliability.

whoShouldApply.headline: Who Should Apply
whoShouldApply.point1: You actively manage a Google Business Profile
whoShouldApply.point2: You want control over what gets published
whoShouldApply.point4: You're open to early-stage product feedback

form.headline: Request Form
form.currentManagement: How do you currently manage your Google Business Profile?
form.whyInterested: Why are you interested in Pragati360?
form.usesGBP: I confirm we actively manage our Google Business Profile (required)
form.clientValidation: Please complete required fields and confirm GBP usage.
form.success: Thanks — your request has been received.

afterYouApply.headline: After You Apply
afterYouApply.point1: We'll review your request within 2 business days
afterYouApply.point2: If it's a good fit, we'll schedule a setup call
afterYouApply.point3: You'll get access to the dashboard after onboarding

trust.title: Trust
trust.headline: Why Local Businesses Trust Pragati360
trust.subHeadline: We're building reliability first, scale second.

noSilentFailures.title: No Silent Failures
noSilentFailures.description: If something goes wrong, you'll know immediately

activityLogs.title: Clear Activity Logs
activityLogs.description: See exactly what was published and when

whatWeDont.headline: What We Don't Do
whatWeDont.noCrossPlatformPromises: No cross-platform promises we can't keep

productOverview.headline: Product overview
productOverview.subHeadline: What Pragati360 delivers for GBP-first businesses
productOverview.body: Pragati360 focuses on reliability for Google Business Profile: scheduling posts, review response, and accurate business data across locations.
productOverview.keyPrinciple1: Human-reviewed publishing to avoid silent failures.
productOverview.keyPrinciple2: Clear ownership — merchant-owned data and consented access.
productOverview.keyPrinciple3: Simple pricing and manual onboarding for high touch support.

unifiedPosting.headline: Unified Posting (coming later)
unifiedPosting.subHeadline: Cross-platform posting will arrive after Early Access
unifiedPosting.body: Unified posting (Instagram, Facebook, GBP) is planned, but during Early Access we focus exclusively on GBP reliability.

multiplePlatforms.title: Multiple platforms
multiplePlatforms.body: Unified posting will let you draft once and publish to multiple networks — coming after Early Access.

independentSuccessFailure.title: Independent success/failure
independentSuccessFailure.body: Each platform can succeed or fail independently; we'll show granular status and avoid silent partial publishes.

noSilentPartialSuccess.title: No silent partial success
noSilentPartialSuccess.body: You will always see which platform published and which failed so you can take action.

trustSecurity.headline: Security & Privacy
trustSecurity.subHeadline: We design for transparency and merchant control
trustSecurity.body: We never store passwords or post without explicit owner approval. Data is encrypted in transit and at rest.

otpLogin.title: OTP & secure access
otpLogin.body: Authentication flows use official Google OAuth; we don't store credentials.

merchantOwnedData.title: Merchant-owned data
merchantOwnedData.body: Your data belongs to you; we store only what's needed for service and compliance.

noSilentFailures.title: No silent failures
noSilentFailures.body: If a post fails to publish we surface the error and next steps for resolution.

activityLogs.title: Activity logs
activityLogs.body: Detailed logs show who approved and when content was published.

cancelAnytime.title: Cancel anytime
cancelAnytime.body: No long-term commitments during Early Access; billing and onboarding are manual.

instagram.title: Instagram
instagram.headline: Instagram integration (coming soon)
instagram.body: Instagram integration is planned after Early Access. We'll provide unified drafting and status for Instagram posts.

googleBusiness.title: Google Business Profile
googleBusiness.headline: Google Business Profile (GBP)
googleBusiness.body: Core support for Google Business Profile: posts, reviews, and business info updates.

alertsReliability.title: Alerts & Reliability
alertsReliability.headline: Reliable alerts
alertsReliability.body: We surface publish errors and review notifications so you can act quickly.

aboutUs.title: About
aboutUs.headline: About Pragati360
aboutUs.body: Founder-led team focused on reliable tools for local businesses.

contact.title: Contact
contact.headline: Get in Touch
contact.subHeadline: We respond to all inquiries within 1 business day.

contactOptions.headline: Contact Options
contactOptions.earlyAccess: For Early Access: Use the Early Access form

footer.tagline: Manage your Google Business Profile with control.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: Sorry, the page you’re looking for doesn’t exist or has been moved.
